Notice Of Motion Andm Otion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages At Trial
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Desrochers, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.438.6615, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Leiann Laiks, Esq., of Fusion Law Group, Tel. 415.625.3953, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID HUNT IND. & DBA SUNWORKS DESIGNERS AND REMODELERS' Motion To Bifurcate Liability And Damages At Trial is denied without prejudice to re-filing before the trial judge. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Desrochers, Esq., of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.438.6615, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Leiann Laiks, Esq., of Fusion Law Group, Tel. 415.625.3953, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID HUNT, IND. & DBA SUNWORKS DESIGNERS AND REMODELERS' MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AND SUMMARY JUDGMENT are denied. Plaintiff has raised triable issues of fact regarding the scope of the Settlement Agreement, whether Plaintiff intended to waive all claims against Defendants, and whether Defendants performed all of their obligations under the Settlement Agreement. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918
